description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in QuickEStore 7.9 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via (1) the OrderID parameter in (a) shipping.cfm and (b) checkout.cfm, (2) ItemID parameter in (c) proddetail.cfm, (3) SubCatID parameter in (d) index.cfm, the (4) CategoryID parameter in (e) prodpage.cfm, and (5) ProdID parameter in (f) Details.cfm.  NOTE: these issues can also be exploited for path disclosure.
